ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cmis_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "constant" TEXT /* Constant name for the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "values" TEXT /* Possible values for the configuration setting */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "binding_type" TEXT /* Type of binding (e.g., AtomPub, Web Services) */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated repository */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the configuration is active */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* JSON object containing validation rules */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the configuration was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cmis_configurations_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cmis_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cmis_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repo_id_value" TEXT /* Repository ID value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the repository */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., local, remote, cloud) */,
  "connection_url" TEXT /* Connection URL or string for the repository */,
  "authentication_method" TEXT /* Method of authentication (e.g., basic, OAuth) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repository (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the repository was accessed */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the repository in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the account is locked */,
  "token" TEXT /* Unique token for session management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the repository */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration setting */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES cmis_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
